framework.name: EBIOS Risk Manager
framework.issuing_body: Agence nationale de la securite des systemes d'information (ANSSI)
framework.scope: Official French risk analysis methodology for information security, applicable to all organizations
framework.structure_description: 5 workshops: scope and security baseline, risk origins, strategic scenarios, operational scenarios, risk treatment. Each workshop has defined activities, inputs, outputs, and participants.

controls.title: Define the study scope
controls.description: Identify the object of the study, its missions, values, and the perimeter of the risk analysis.
controls.description_nl: Identifier l'objet de l'etude, ses missions, ses valeurs et le perimetre de l'analyse de risque.
controls.category: Atelier 1 - Cadrage et socle de securite

controls.title: Identify business values
controls.description: Determine essential business processes, information, and functions that support the organization's missions.
controls.description_nl: Determiner les processus metier essentiels, les informations et fonctions qui soutiennent les missions de l'organisation.
controls.category: Atelier 1 - Cadrage et socle de securite

controls.title: Identify supporting assets
controls.description: Map the information system assets that support business values: hardware, software, networks, people, facilities.
controls.description_nl: Cartographier les biens du systeme d'information supportant les valeurs metier : materiels, logiciels, reseaux, personnes, locaux.
controls.category: Atelier 1 - Cadrage et socle de securite

controls.title: Establish the security baseline
controls.description: Define the applicable security baseline from regulations, standards, and state of the art relevant to the study scope.
controls.description_nl: Definir le socle de securite applicable a partir des reglementations, normes et etat de l'art pertinents pour le perimetre etudie.
controls.category: Atelier 1 - Cadrage et socle de securite

controls.title: Assess security baseline compliance
controls.title_nl: Evaluer la conformite au socle de securite
controls.description: Assess the current level of compliance against the defined security baseline and identify gaps.
controls.description_nl: Evaluer le niveau de conformite actuel par rapport au socle de securite defini et identifier les ecarts.
controls.category: Atelier 1 - Cadrage et socle de securite

controls.title: Define the feared events
controls.description: For each business value, identify feared events (loss of confidentiality, integrity, availability) and their severity.
controls.description_nl: Pour chaque valeur metier, identifier les evenements redoutes (perte de confidentialite, integrite, disponibilite) et leur gravite.
controls.category: Atelier 1 - Cadrage et socle de securite

controls.title: Identify risk origins
controls.description: Identify threat actors (risk origins) relevant to the study scope: cybercriminals, competitors, insiders, state actors.
controls.description_nl: Identifier les acteurs de la menace (sources de risque) pertinents pour le perimetre etudie : cybercriminels, concurrents, internes, acteurs etatiques.

controls.title: Define threat objectives
controls.description: For each risk origin, define their strategic objectives and target objectives against the study scope.
controls.description_nl: Pour chaque source de risque, definir leurs objectifs strategiques et objectifs vises contre le perimetre etudie.

controls.title: Evaluate risk origin motivation
controls.title_nl: Evaluer la motivation des sources de risque
controls.description: Assess the motivation, resources, and capability of each identified risk origin.
controls.description_nl: Evaluer la motivation, les ressources et la capacite de chaque source de risque identifiee.

controls.title: Select priority risk origin pairs
controls.description: Prioritize risk origin / target objective pairs based on relevance and likelihood.
controls.description_nl: Prioriser les couples source de risque / objectif vise en fonction de la pertinence et de la vraisemblance.

controls.title: Build the ecosystem map
controls.description: Map the ecosystem of stakeholders, partners, suppliers, and interfaces that could be exploited by risk origins.
controls.description_nl: Cartographier l'ecosysteme des parties prenantes, partenaires, fournisseurs et interfaces qui pourraient etre exploites par les sources de risque.

controls.title: Assess ecosystem vulnerability
controls.description: Evaluate the exposure, dependency, and trust level of each ecosystem stakeholder.
controls.description_nl: Evaluer l'exposition, la dependance et le niveau de confiance de chaque partie prenante de l'ecosysteme.

controls.title: Define strategic scenarios
controls.description: Build strategic attack scenarios describing how a risk origin could reach its target objective via the ecosystem.
controls.description_nl: Construire des scenarios d'attaque strategiques decrivant comment une source de risque pourrait atteindre son objectif vise via l'ecosysteme.

controls.title: Assess strategic scenario severity
controls.title_nl: Evaluer la gravite des scenarios strategiques
controls.description: Evaluate the severity of each strategic scenario based on impact on business values.
controls.description_nl: Evaluer la gravite de chaque scenario strategique en fonction de l'impact sur les valeurs metier.

controls.title: Build operational scenarios
controls.description: Detail the technical attack paths (kill chain) for each strategic scenario, identifying exploited vulnerabilities and techniques.
controls.description_nl: Detailler les chemins d'attaque techniques (kill chain) pour chaque scenario strategique, identifiant les vulnerabilites et techniques exploitees.

controls.title: Assess operational scenario likelihood
controls.title_nl: Evaluer la vraisemblance des scenarios operationnels
controls.description: Evaluate the likelihood of each operational scenario based on attacker capability and existing controls.
controls.description_nl: Evaluer la vraisemblance de chaque scenario operationnel en fonction de la capacite de l'attaquant et des controles existants.

controls.title: Map scenarios to MITRE ATT&CK
controls.title_nl: Cartographier les scenarios sur MITRE ATT&CK
controls.description: Map operational attack scenarios to MITRE ATT&CK techniques for structured threat intelligence.
controls.description_nl: Cartographier les scenarios d'attaque operationnels sur les techniques MITRE ATT&CK pour une intelligence de menace structuree.

controls.title: Define the risk treatment strategy
controls.title_nl: Definir la strategie de traitement des risques
controls.description: For each risk, decide on treatment: reduction, acceptance, transfer, or avoidance, based on risk appetite.
controls.description_nl: Pour chaque risque, decider du traitement : reduction, acceptation, transfert ou evitement, en fonction de l'appetit au risque.

controls.title: Define security measures
controls.description: Specify the security measures to implement for risk reduction, covering prevention, detection, and response.
controls.description_nl: Specifier les mesures de securite a mettre en oeuvre pour la reduction des risques, couvrant la prevention, la detection et la reponse.

controls.title: Evaluate residual risks
controls.description: Assess the residual risk after planned security measures are applied and validate acceptability.
controls.description_nl: Evaluer le risque residuel apres application des mesures de securite prevues et valider l'acceptabilite.

controls.title: Build the security improvement plan
controls.title_nl: Construire le plan d'amelioration de la securite
controls.description: Produce an actionable security improvement plan with priorities, timelines, responsibilities, and monitoring indicators.
controls.description_nl: Produire un plan d'amelioration de la securite actionnable avec des priorites, des echeances, des responsabilites et des indicateurs de suivi.

controls.title: Obtain risk acceptance decision
controls.title_nl: Obtenir la decision d'acceptation des risques
controls.description: Present residual risks to management for formal acceptance and obtain signed approval.
controls.description_nl: Presenter les risques residuels a la direction pour acceptation formelle et obtenir l'approbation signee.

controls.title: Implement continuous monitoring framework
controls.title_nl: Mettre en place le cadre de surveillance continue
controls.description: Establish a framework for continuous monitoring of the risk landscape and effectiveness of security measures.
controls.description_nl: Etablir un cadre de surveillance continue du paysage de risques et de l'efficacite des mesures de securite.
